nasb.text: You are to speak to him and put the words in his mouth; and I, even I, will be with your mouth and his mouth, and I will teach you what you are to do.

esv.text: You shall speak to him and put the words in his mouth, and I will be with your mouth and with his mouth and will teach you both what to do.

cnv.text: 你要對他說話，把你要說的話放在他的口裡；我必與你的口同在，也與他的口同在；我必指教你們當行的事。

ccb.text: 你要把该说的话传给他，我会赐你们口才，教你们如何行事。
